svg.title: Modern Data Engineering Docs Directory Structure 2026
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing 8 layers of documentation for modern data engineering projects with AI-assisted development

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should be in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in 00-requirements for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in 01-architecture for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What is the ODCS data contract standard and how to use it in a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in 03-data-sources for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in 04-data-models for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('How to structure data engineering testing documentation including dbt tests and Great Expectations?')
sendPrompt('What should go in runbooks and operations docs for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in data governance and compliance docs for a data engineering project?')
sendPrompt('What should go in the AI context docs directory for a data engineering project in 2026?')

svg.text: Click any layer for a deep-dive prompt

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do ADR architecture decision records work in data engineering?')
sendPrompt('What is ODCS and how does it replace traditional API contract docs?')
g.text: Schema + SLA + quality in one file

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is an impact matrix in data engineering and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('How to write structured troubleshooting playbooks for data pipelines?')
sendPrompt('How to handle GDPR and CCPA compliance documentation in data engineering?')
sendPrompt('What are scoped .mdc AI rules for Cursor in a data engineering project?')

svg.text: 2025–2026 north star shifts driving this structure
Data-as-product · Contract-first (ODCS/Bitol) · AI-agent-first docs (AGENTS.md std, Linux Foundation)
dbt + Fivetran merged Jun 2026 · ODCS v3.1 (Bitol) is de facto contract standard
